commands: NPM_CONFIG_PREFIX=$(pwd)/custom-prefix npm install -g ./npm-global-custom-prefix-pkg # Should install to custom prefix and create link
test -f custom-prefix/bin/npm-global-custom-prefix-cli && echo 'binary in custom prefix' # Verify installed to custom prefix
test -L $VP_HOME/bin/npm-global-custom-prefix-cli && echo 'link created' # Link should exist
npm-global-custom-prefix-cli # Should be callable via the link
NPM_CONFIG_PREFIX=$(pwd)/custom-prefix npm uninstall -g npm-global-custom-prefix-pkg; rm -rf custom-prefix # Cleanup
